allow: Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'while ! grep -q "ready in" /tmp/vite-dev.log; do sleep 1; done')
Bash(echo "Started Vue dev server on port 5175 with PID: $!")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/distros.json'\); const byFam={}; for\(const x of d.distros\){byFam[x.familyId]=\(byFam[x.familyId]||0\)+1;} const f=Object.entries\(byFam\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\); console.log\('families used:',f.length\); console.log\(f.map\(e=>e[0]+':'+e[1]\).join\('  '\)\);")
